content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:1) but demo credentials are placeholders ("test"/"changeme") and notes.txt just says "TBD"; reviewers cannot access the app.
Pierre: Apple's reviewers need working credentials and clear instructions to get past a login wall, otherwise the app gets rejected outright for being unreviewable. Here the demo_user.txt, demo_password.txt, and notes.txt are all placeholder text with no real account or steps. Please provide a real, working demo account and notes describing how to reach core features (e.g. any paywall or gated flows) before submission.
